trigger_summary: Any emergency classification or emergency safety policy hit
clinical_explanation: Emergency red flags always override medication draft generation.
Safety policy blocks are authoritative over candidate therapy selection.

trigger_summary: Target medication was requested by patient without doctor authorization
clinical_explanation: Patient requests must not become prescriptions without clinician authorization.

trigger_summary: Required clinical information is missing for the target risk class
clinical_explanation: Generation is blocked only when missing data are clinically blocking for the candidate medication.

trigger_summary: Vulnerable context with a low-risk protocol medication
clinical_explanation: Low-risk drafts may be shown to a clinician in vulnerable contexts but never finalized automatically.

trigger_summary: Low-risk target, no blocking safety policy, no blocking missing data
clinical_explanation: Only controlled low-risk protocols can enter automatic draft generation.
